zh.Cheadle, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾黑阿德爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Basset於1366年6月13日出生在英國斯塔福爾布洛爾時，他的父親Ralph Basset35歲，母親Margaret Beke29歲。他於大約1400年與Margaret Maud Dethick在英國可瓦爾紐哈爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1455年4月15日在英國越可爾享年88歲。

zh-hans.Cheadle, Staffordshire, England: 英国斯塔福爾黑阿德爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Basset于1366年6月13日出生在英国斯塔福爾布洛爾时，他的父亲Ralph Basset35岁，母亲Margaret Beke29岁。他于大约1400年与Margaret Maud Dethick在英国可瓦爾紐哈爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1455年4月15日在英国越可爾享年88岁。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Basset was born on 13 June 1366, in Blore, Staffordshire, England, his father, Ralph Basset, was 35 and his mother, Margaret Beke, was 29. He married Margaret Maud Dethick about 1400, in Newhall, Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 15 April 1455, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 88.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Basset est né le 13 juin 1366, à Blore, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Basset, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Margaret Beke, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Maud Dethick environ 1400, à Newhall, Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 15 avril 1455, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 88 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Basset am 13. Juni 1366 in Blore, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Basset 35 und seine Mutter Margaret Beke 29. Er hat um 1400 in Newhall, Cornwall, England Margaret Maud Dethick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 15. April 1455 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Basset è nato il il 13 giugno 1366 nel Blore, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Ralph Basset, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Beke, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Maud Dethick circa 1400, nel Newhall, Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 15 aprile 1455, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 88 anni.

ja.Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.Newhall, Cornwall, England: イギリスコルンワルニューハル
ja.Blore, Staffordshire, England: イギリススタフォードシュアイアブロア
ja.Cheadle, Staffordshire, England: イギリススタフォードシュアイアチェアドル
ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Bassetが1366年6月13日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアブロアで生まれた時，父Ralph Bassetは35歳，母Margaret Bekeは29歳であった。約1400年にイギリスコルンワルニューハルでMargaret Maud Dethickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1455年4月15日にイギリスヨークシュアイアで88歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Basset(이)가 1366년 6월 13일 영국 스태퍼드실르 블로어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Basset(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Beke(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1400년 영국 코른월 뉴홀에서 Margaret Maud Dethick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1455년 4월 15일 영국 요르크실르에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.13 Jun 1366–15 Apr 1455: 1366 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 13–1455 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 15

pt.13 Jun 1366–15 Apr 1455: 13 de junho de 1366–15 de abril de 1455
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Basset nasceu em 13 de junho de 1366, em Blore, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Basset, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Beke, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Maud Dethick aproximadamente 1400, em Newhall, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de abril de 1455, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 88 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Basset родился 13 июня 1366 г. в местности блор, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph Basset было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Beke, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Maud Dethick около 1400 г. в местности нюхолл, корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 15 апреля 1455 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 88 лет.

es.13 Jun 1366–15 Apr 1455: 13 de junio de 1366–15 de abril de 1455
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph Basset nació el 13 de junio de 1366, en Blore, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph Basset, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Margaret Beke, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Margaret Maud Dethick aproximadamente 1400, en Newhall, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 15 de abril de 1455, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 88 años.
